title: Obsidian Tools by CalculusEyesight
description: obsidian tools that are crafted by using blaze rods instead of sticks
body: In this mod obsidian tools can be crafted using the same recipe vanilla tools use, but with blaze rods instead of sticks and obsidian instead of ores. It contains a sword,axe,pickaxe,hoe and shovel. The strongest tool you can obtain is the crying obsidian sword which applies the slowness effects to mobs after they have been hit and when crafted has a knockback of 5. This is a standalone version from the tools that already exist in my other mod called minecraft expansion i just thought maybe some people will want just the obsidian tools.
